case_title: PATEL, DHANJI vs. MOORE, EVERETT D. et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, EVERETT D.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER & ORDER POSTING AND MAILING SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DHANJI

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOORE, EVERETT D. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3048 16TH ST, RM. 321, S.F, CA. $1,200.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEF. VACATES BY 2-8-94, 5PM, JUDGMENT AMOUNT REDUCED TO $770. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. DEF. CERTIFIES NO OTHER OCCUPANTS. SEC. DEPOSIT FORF. TO PL.WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY. NO FURTHER STAYS OF EXECUTION. SEE FILE FOR JUDGMENT DETAILS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DHANJI AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, EVERETT D. DOES 1 TO X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT MOORE, EVERETT D. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MOORE, EVERETT D.

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DHANJI SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-24-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 03 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JAN-31-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT. 3, JUDGE J. ORR, CSR D. ADIBZADEH, CLERK E.MONTI 3:00 PM. C/C FOR SETTL CONF. ARNOLD EVJE APPEARING FOR PLTF. DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. A STIP JUDGMENT IS READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: PLTF AWARDED REST & POSS OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 3048 - 16TH ST.#321. RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED. $1200.00 IN RENT/DAMAGES. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT STAYED TO 2-8-94,5PM. IF DEFT VACATES BY 2-8-94, JUDGMENT TO BE REDUCED TO $770.00. ANY PROPERTY LEFT IS DEEMED ABANDONED & DEFT MAINTAINS THAT NO OTHER OCCUPANTS RESIDE AT PROPERTY. ALL FURTHER CLAIMS WAIVED. SEC. DEPOSIT IS FORFEITED. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
